title: K.K. Slider - Super Mario Bros. 2 Overworld
description:
Third request (it's about damn time, too), requested by leonboy888. You may notice that I'm -not- doing them in the order that I posted them in "Number One Hundred". This is because I want to avoid MIDI-swapping, but I'm sorta lazy, so the SMB2 song was the easiest to do. 

You may also notice that I've made a nice little arrangement out of this song. So yeah... Enjoy!

To make your own K.K. Slider songs, here's the K.K. Soundfont: https://www.dropbox.com/s/e7090fg2g8730wt/KK%20Slider%20Soundfont.zip
